description_long: This is a sealed bag of Sonoma Snacks Vegetable Crisps, featuring a matte, flexible plastic exterior with a resealable top. The front of the bag displays a vibrant image of assorted vegetable crisps, including zucchini, sweet potato, carrot, okra, and cauliflower, arranged in a colorful pile. The brand logo 'SONOMA SNACKS' is prominently displayed in a yellow oval at the top center, with the product name 'VEGETABLE CRISPS' below it in bold white letters. The back of the bag provides detailed product information, including a description of the vegetable crisps, a list of ingredients, and a nutrition facts panel. The sides of the bag are narrower and show partial graphics and text, including certifications and additional product highlights. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and designed to attract attention on a store shelf or in an urban snack setting.
description: A matte plastic bag of Sonoma Snacks Vegetable Crisps with colorful vegetable imagery and clear branding. The packaging is resealable and features detailed product and nutritional information.
description_view_0: A narrow side view showing the edge of the bag with partial graphics and certification labels visible.
description_view_1: The back view displays the full nutrition facts panel, product description, and images of the vegetable crisps.
description_view_2: Another narrow side view, showing the seam and partial text, with less visible branding.
description_view_3: The front view highlights the Sonoma Snacks logo, vibrant vegetable crisp imagery, and product name.
attribute_brand_logo: A yellow oval with 'SONOMA SNACKS' in black text, located at the top center of the front and back of the bag.
attribute_flavor_indication: Images and text on the front indicate the flavor as assorted vegetable crisps, including cauliflower, tomato, carrot, okra, and sweet potato.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A nutrition facts panel is visible on the back of the bag, listing calories and other nutritional information.
attribute_promotional_graphics: A 'Non-GMO Project Verified' badge and '100% Plant-Based' icon are visible on the front and side of the bag.
